onboarding.welcome_back: Welcome back! Use /feed to browse the marketplace or /profile to update your details.
onboarding.share_contact: To continue, please share your phone number.
onboarding.no_username: No Telegram username found — buyers will see your phone/branch on reveal instead. You can add a username in Telegram Settings anytime.
onboarding.neighborhood_skipped: Neighborhood skipped — you can add it later from /profile.
onboarding.enter_branch_name: What is the name of your branch? (e.g. 'Adama Main Branch')
onboarding.already_registered: You are already registered. Use /feed to browse the marketplace.
CONTACT_NOT_SELF: Please share your own contact, not someone else's.
DUPLICATE_PHONE: This phone number is already registered with this bank under a different Telegram account.
ZONE_REGION_MISMATCH: Please pick a zone from the region you selected.
INVALID_BRANCH_NAME: Branch name must be at least 3 characters.
BAND_NOT_FOUND: Selected grade band is not available.
GRADE_BAND_MISMATCH: Please pick a grade from the band you selected.
PROFILE_INCOMPLETE: Please finish registration before selecting transfer interests.
STALE_INTERACTION: This selection screen has expired — please reopen /interests.
NO_SELECTION: Select at least one location before confirming.
FORBIDDEN: You can only remove your own interests.
TARGET_INACTIVE: This candidate is no longer available.
BANK_CHANGE_UNSUPPORTED: Changing your bank isn't supported — please contact support.
INVALID_ZONE: zoneId must reference a zone_subcity, not a region.
FILTER_INCOMPLETE: scope 'region' requires regionId; scope 'zone' requires zoneId.
BANK_HAS_ACTIVE_USERS: Cannot deactivate a bank with active users. Reassign or deactivate users first.
PARENT_REQUIRED: A zone/subcity must specify a parent region.
REGION_CANNOT_HAVE_PARENT: Regions are top-level and cannot be reassigned a parent.
CYCLE_DETECTED: A location cannot be moved under its own descendant.
LOCATION_HAS_ACTIVE_USERS: Cannot deactivate a location with active users.
GRADE_HAS_ACTIVE_USERS: Cannot deactivate a grade with active users.
REGION_LEVEL_MATCH_WARNING: This candidate is interested in the broader {region} region, not specifically {zone}.
INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
ACCOUNT_DISABLED: Account is disabled. Contact your administrator.
INVALID_TOKEN_FOR_ROUTER: Token is not valid for this router.
INSUFFICIENT_ROLE: Your role does not permit this action.
RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please slow down.
NO_MATCHES: No matches yet. We'll notify you as soon as one appears.
INTEREST_CONFIRMED: You'll be notified when a matching lead appears. Use /feed anytime to browse now.
